name: Pistachio-Stuffed Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the broiler.
2. Remove stems from mushrooms and chop finely. Reserve caps.
3. Saute the stems and onions in 1/4 cup butter or margarine until tender.
4. Stir in the bread crumbs, pistachios, parsley, marjoram, and salt, mixing well.
5. Place the mushroom caps, stem-side up, on a baking sheet.
6. Fill the centers with the stuffing and sprinkle with about 3 tablespoons melted butter.
7. Broil about 6 inches from heat source for 5 minutes or until browned and heated through.
